AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON APR-01-1996

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SISON, RAYMOND $10,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $471.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,871.50, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF[S]. PLTF KUZMENKO TO HAVE $5350 AND PROBER, $5050, OF PRINCIPAL.
